# src/cache

Pipeline cache directory. All files here are generated by the pipeline and excluded from version control.

| Subfolder | Contents |
|-----------|----------|
| `{model}_embeddings/` | Embeddings (`.npy` files, one per dataset) |
| `{model}_reduced_2d/` | 2D reductions for visualization (`.npy` files) |
| `{model}_reduced_embeddings/` | High-dim reductions used for clustering (`.npy` files) |
| `{model}_scores/` | Per-level clustering metric scores (`.npy` files) |
| `{model}_linkage/` | Agglomerative linkage matrices (`.npy` files) |
| `ground_truth_trees/` | Pre-built ground truth trees (`.pkl` files) |
| `hercules_run/` | Hercules clustering intermediate outputs |

Final outputs (CSVs, figures, Shepard diagrams, viz metric CSVs) are saved to `results/`. To regenerate, run the benchmark pipeline as described in [INSTALL.md](../../INSTALL.md).
